data.name: ST0001
data.value: {0} depends on {1}, it will be added automatically.

data.name: ST0002
data.value: {0} requires {1}, you should add it manually.

data.name: ST0003
data.value: {0} suggests adding {1}.

data.name: ST1001
data.value: The request contains an invalid argument.

data.name: ST1002
data.value: Unable to resolve tenant for the current request.

data.name: ST1003
data.value: The request cannot be executed in the current system state.

data.name: ST1004
data.value: The request does not have valid authentication credentials.

data.name: ST1005
data.value: You do not have permission to perform this action.

data.name: ST1006
data.value: The requested resource was not found.

data.name: ST1007
data.value: The resource already exists.

data.name: ST1008
data.value: A concurrency conflict occurred while saving to the database.

data.name: ST1009
data.value: One or more validation errors occurred.

data.name: ST1010
data.value: Resource name is required.

data.name: ST1011
data.value: Rate limit exceeded.

data.name: ST1012
data.value: Invalid request payload.

data.name: ST1013
data.value: Cross-parent reading is not supported for this resource.

data.name: ST1014
data.value: Resource '{0}' not found.

data.name: ST1015
data.value: The page token is invalid or has expired.

data.name: ST1016
data.value: The filter expression is malformed.

data.name: ST1017
data.value: The order_by expression is malformed.

data.name: ST1018
data.value: An error occurred.
